displayTitle: Han Solo: Captain of the Millennium Falcon
synopsis: Discover the greatest moments of smuggler-turned-hero Han Solo! Watch his first meeting with Luke Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi on Tatooine, Han's adventures with his trusty co-pilot Chewbacca, and the daring rescue of Princess Leia aboard the Death Star!
title: Han Solo: Captain of the Millennium Falcon
